title: Minecraft-Sync
description: The Minecraft Sync 2.0 Discord Bot is designed to seamlessly synchronize chat between Minecraft servers and Discord. It allows real-time communication across both platforms, making it easy to connect and interact. For support or inquiries, users can join t
body:
# Description
This solution was specifically developed for the Minecraft Sync 2.0 Discord Bot.  
Together, the bot and this integration allow you to seamlessly synchronize the Minecraft chat with a Discord chat.  
This enables you to connect chats between both platforms in real time effortlessly!

**Invite the bot via the following link:** [bot invite link](https://mc-sync.eu/invite)  
**Support:** [support discord server](https://mc-sync.eu/support)  
**Website:** [https://mc-sync.eu](https://mc-sync.eu)  
**Email:** support@mail.mc-sync.eu  

# Setup
After the first startup, the token is generated automatically.  
If needed, it can be adjusted in the following file: `config.yml`.

## Configuration
1. **Obtain the Token**  
   Invite the Discord bot to your server and execute **/chat-sync add**.  
   Copy the generated token!

2. **Install the Plugin/Mod**  
   Upload the plugin or mod to your server and restart it.  
   Once the server is running, paste the token into the `config.yml` file and restart it again.

I hope this guide helps you set everything up smoothly.  
If you have any questions, feel free to reach out anytime! 😊
